package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for map_based_updates_passed_from_handler_to_repository: Update maps built from request payloads and passed through layers without typed ownership.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule081NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule081NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule081NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario081Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule081NegativeService, input Rule081NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
